[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 1110001 4
1 0010111 4
2 1001111 5
3 1010111 5
4 0111000 3
5 1100100 3
6 1010000 2
7 1111101 6

01 10 1111101 6 match 7
12 21 1111101 6 match 7

34 43 1011111 6

56 65 1111111 a
67 76 1111100 5
70 07 1110100 4

61 16 1111101 6 match 7
72 27 1110101 5
